  <script>
  function clearCookieFromAllPaths(cookieName) {
    document.cookie = encodeURIComponent(cookieName) + "=; expires=Thu, 01-Jan-1970 00:00:01 GMT; path=/";
    // iterates over all domains and paths to clear cookie by name
    let d = window.location.hostname.split(".");
    while (d.length > 0) {
      let cookieBase;
      cookieBase = encodeURIComponent(cookieName) + '=; expires=Thu, 01-Jan-1970 00:00:01 GMT; domain=' + d.join('.') + ' ;path=';
      let p = location.pathname.split('/');
      document.cookie = cookieBase + '/';
      while (p.length > 0) {
        document.cookie = cookieBase + p.join('/');
        p.pop();
      }
      d.shift();
    }
  }

    const showCouponBanner = async (text, animate=false) => {

        const root = document.querySelector('.top-container')
        if (!root) {
            // Failed to find top bar
            return
        }
        _createCouponBanner(root, text, animate)
    }

    const hideCouponBanner = () => {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const animationDuration = 600
            const banner = document.querySelector('#couponbanner')
            if (!banner) {
                resolve(false)
                return
            }
            banner.classList.add('hide')
            setTimeout(() => {
                _removeCouponBodyClass()
                resolve(true)
            }, animationDuration)
        })
    }

    const _addCouponBodyClass = () => {
        document.body.classList.add('has-couponbanner')
    }

    const _removeCouponBodyClass = () => {
        document.body.classList.remove('has-couponbanner')
    }

    const _createCouponBanner = (root, text, animate=false) => {
        // Create elements
        const textNode = document.createTextNode(text)
        const textContainer = document.createElement('div')
        const navElement = document.createElement('nav')

        // Add classes/ids to new elements
        textContainer.classList.add('container-fluid')
        navElement.setAttribute('id', 'couponbanner');

        // Add optional animate class
        if (animate) {
            navElement.classList.add('animated')
        }

        // Set DOM hierarchy
        textContainer.appendChild(textNode)
        navElement.appendChild(textContainer)
        root.prepend(navElement)

        // Add coupon class to body and update height
        _addCouponBodyClass()
    }

        !isFormDismissed &&
        !isUserReferred &&
        !isPageBlacklisted()
      );
    };

    const showKlaviyoForm = (popupDelay) => {
      // START DELAY_KLAVIYO_POPUP_EXPERIMENT
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (popupDelay > 0) {
          const landing_page_inputs = [
            ...document.getElementsByName('zip_code'),
            ...document.getElementsByName('email')
          ]
          if (landing_page_inputs.includes(document.activeElement)) {
            return
          }
        }

        // keep start
        window._klOnsite = window._klOnsite || [];
        window._klOnsite.push(['openForm', KLAVIYO_FORM_ID]);
        // keep end
      }, popupDelay)
      // END DELAY_KLAVIYO_POPUP_EXPERIMENT
    };

    const hasEmailZipSaved = () => {
      return Boolean(
        localStorage.getItem('klaviyoFormEmail') &&
        localStorage.getItem('klaviyoFormZipCode')
      );
    };

    const updateInputModes = () => {
      const zipInput = (
        document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Zip Code"]')[0] ||
        document.querySelectorAll('input[placeholder="Zip Code"]')[0]
      );
      if (zipInput) {
          zipInput.setAttribute("inputmode", "numeric")
      }

      const phoneInput = (
        document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Phone Number"]')[0] ||
        document.querySelectorAll('input[placeholder="Phone Number"]')[0]
      );
      if (phoneInput) {
          phoneInput.setAttribute("inputmode", "numeric")
      }

      const emailInput = (
        document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Email"]')[0] ||
        document.querySelectorAll('input[placeholder="Email"]')[0]
      );
      if (emailInput) {
          emailInput.setAttribute("inputmode", "email")
          emailInput.setAttribute("autocapitalize", "none")
      }
    };

    const hideKlaviyo = () => {
      const klaviyoDiv = document.querySelector('.needsclick');
      if (klaviyoDiv){
        klaviyoDiv.setAttribute("style", "display:none");
      }
    }

    const applyCoupon = async () => {
      if (hasEmailZipSaved()) {
        const couponCode = localStorage.getItem('couponCode');

        if (couponCode) {
          const response = await setCouponRequest(couponCode);
          if (response.status >= 200 && response.status <= 299) {
            const responseBody = await response.json();
            window.SIGNUP_COUPON_CODE = responseBody.coupon_code;
            localStorage.setItem('couponBannerMsg', responseBody.customer_description)
            return
          }
        }
        const couponFailureMsg = 'Failed to apply coupon. Please contact customer support.'
        localStorage.setItem('couponBannerMsg', couponFailureMsg)
      }
    }

    const setCouponRequest = async (coupon_code) => {
      const csrftoken = document.querySelector('[name=csrfmiddlewaretoken]').value;
      const response = await fetch('/api/coupon', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'X-CSRFToken': csrftoken,
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          coupon_code: coupon_code,
        }),
      });
      return response;
    };

    const handleKlaviyoClose = debounce(() => {
      const body = document.body;
      body.classList.remove('klaviyoModalOpen');
      window.scrollTo(0, 0);
      const couponBannerMsg = localStorage.getItem('couponBannerMsg');
      if (couponBannerMsg) {
        showCouponBanner(couponBannerMsg, true);
      }
      hideKlaviyo();
      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('klaviyoModalRedirect'));
    }, DEBOUNCE_DELAY, {immediate: true});

    const handleKlaviyoOpen = debounce(() => {
        if (window.eventsAPI) {
          window.eventsAPI.trackAnalyticsEvent("FE Klaviyo Form Shown").catch(() => {});
        }
        document.body.classList.add('klaviyoModalOpen')
        setTimeout(() => {
            updateInputModes()
        }, 200)
    }, DEBOUNCE_DELAY, {immediate: true})

    const handleKlaviyoEmailStep = debounce((data) => {
      const { $email, $zip, $coupon_code } = data;
      localStorage.setItem('klaviyoFormEmail', $email);
      localStorage.setItem('klaviyoFormZipCode', $zip);
      localStorage.setItem('couponCode', $coupon_code);
      applyCoupon();
      trackSubscribedEvent('FE Email Subscribed', data, {email: $email, address: {postalCode: $zip}});
    }, DEBOUNCE_DELAY, {immediate: true})

    const handleKlaviyoPhoneStep = debounce((data) => {
      const { $phone_number } = data;
      if ($phone_number) {
        localStorage.setItem('klaviyoFormPhone', $phone_number);
        trackSubscribedEvent('FE SMS Subscribed', data, {phone: $phone_number});
      }
      handleKlaviyoClose();
    }, DEBOUNCE_DELAY, {immediate: true})

    const handleKlaviyoStepSubmit = (data) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        updateInputModes()
      }, 200)
      switch (data?.$step_name) {
        case EMAIL_STEP_NAME:
          handleKlaviyoEmailStep(data);
          break;
        case PHONE_STEP_NAME:
          handleKlaviyoPhoneStep(data)
      }
    }

    const trackSubscribedEvent = (eventName, data, traits) => {
      const integrations = {
        'Facebook Conversions API': false,
        'Facebook Conversions API (Actions)': false,
        'Facebook Pixel': false,
      };
      const event = {
        eventProperties: data,
        eventOptions: {
          integrations: integrations,
          traits: traits,
        },
      };
      window.analytics.track(eventName, event.eventProperties, event.eventOptions);
    }

    const formListenerCallback = (e) => {
      // This is to demonstrate how we can use Klaviyo event types for
      // capturing submitted form data. Change or remove as necessary.
      // https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/track_klaviyo_form_activity_using_javascript
      const type = e.detail.type;
      const data = e.detail.metaData;
      switch (type) {
        case 'open':
          handleKlaviyoOpen()
          break;
        case 'stepSubmit':
          handleKlaviyoStepSubmit(data)
          break;
        case 'close':
          handleKlaviyoClose()
          break;
      }
    }

    if (shouldTriggerKlaviyoForm()) {
      showKlaviyoForm(popupDelay);
    }

    window.addEventListener('klaviyoForms', formListenerCallback);
  }
</script>

    <script>
    const setBodyObserverLookingForWunderkind = () => {
        const WUNDERKIND_BANNER_PARENT_CLASS = 'bx-type-nanobar';
        const targetNode = document.body;
        const config = { childList: true, subtree: false };
        const callback = (mutationList, observer) => {
            for (const mutation of mutationList) {
                if (mutation.type === "childList") {
                    mutation.addedNodes.forEach(node => {
                    if (node && node.classList && node.classList.contains(WUNDERKIND_BANNER_PARENT_CLASS)) {
                        document.body.classList.add('has-wunderkind-banner');
                        document.body.classList.remove('has-couponbanner');
                    }
                    })
                }
            }
        };
        const observer = new MutationObserver(callback);
        observer.observe(targetNode, config);
    }

    setBodyObserverLookingForWunderkind()
</script>

  <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      // Find all mobile CTA buttons and add tracking
      const mobileCTAButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.hide-desktop.btn, .hide-desktop button, .footer .hide-desktop a.button');

      mobileCTAButtons.forEach((button) => {
        button.addEventListener('click', function() {
          if (window.analytics) {
            // Get the button location based on the section its in,
            // then walk up the DOM to find the containing section.
            let element = this;
            let buttonLocation = undefined;
            let buttonType = undefined;

            if (element.classList.contains('submit-button') && element.closest('.signup-register-user')) {
              buttonLocation = "Registration Form";
              buttonType = "zip/email form submit";
            } else if (element.closest('.section-cta')) {
              buttonLocation = "Autopilot Your Diet";
              buttonType = "zip/email form anchor";
            } else if (element.closest('.content-section-4')) {
              buttonLocation = "Whats In Your Delivery";
              buttonType = "zip/email form anchor";
            } else if (element.closest('.footer')) {
              buttonLocation = "Footer";
              buttonType = "page reload";
            }

            // Track the event
            window.analytics.track('Mobile Homepage CTA Clicked', {
              user_id: 'None',
              anonymous_id: 'e3f5574d-b45d-472f-a57c-710bb14d2343',
              variant: 'control',
              button_type: buttonType,
              button_text: this.textContent.trim(),
              button_location: buttonLocation,
            });
          }
        });
      });
    });
  </script>
